data.title: BRETT Hits All-Time High, Touches $2B Market Cap Amid Binance, Coinbase Listing Buzz
data.description: Brett (BRETT) was one of the most successful meme coins over the last week, with returns eclipsing those of blue-chip currencies like Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB).
